world.title: Global climate summit ends with landmark pledge on emissions
world.summary: Delegates from 190 countries agreed to a phased reduction framework, with review checkpoints every two years.

world.title: Historic ceasefire agreement reaches its first 30-day milestone
world.summary: Observers report the truce is largely holding, with humanitarian corridors now open in three regions.

world.title: Elections watchdog reports record turnout across the region
world.summary: Early counts suggest turnout topped 78%, the highest in three decades of monitoring.

world.title: New rail corridor connects three capitals for the first time
world.summary: The 1,200 km high-speed line cuts cross-border travel from fourteen hours to five.

world.title: UN report highlights progress on global literacy goals
world.summary: Youth literacy has climbed to 94% worldwide, though regional gaps persist, the agency said.

world.title: Coastal cities test early-warning network for extreme weather
world.summary: The sensor mesh gives residents up to 40 minutes of additional evacuation lead time.

tech.title: Open-source laptop project ships its first developer edition
tech.summary: The modular design lets owners swap the mainboard, ports, and battery without special tools.

tech.title: Researchers demo battery tech with double today's energy density
tech.summary: Solid-state cells survived 1,000 charge cycles in lab testing while retaining 92% capacity.

tech.title: Show HN: I built a self-hosted dashboard for everything I use
tech.summary: A weekend project that grew into a full personal command center — launcher, feeds, lists and notes.

tech.title: Major browser adds native support for local-first sync
tech.summary: The API lets web apps sync across devices end-to-end encrypted, without a vendor cloud.

tech.title: The quiet rise of small language models on personal hardware
tech.summary: Sub-10B parameter models now handle most everyday tasks entirely on-device.

tech.title: Ask HN: What does your personal productivity stack look like in 2026?
tech.summary: Hundreds of replies compare launchers, note systems, and self-hosted dashboards.

business.title: Markets steady as central bank signals no change to rates
business.summary: Equities drifted higher after the announcement, with tech and utilities leading gains.

business.title: Small-business optimism index hits a four-year high
business.summary: Hiring plans and capital-spending intentions both rose for the third straight month.

business.title: Chipmaker announces $20B expansion of domestic fabrication
business.summary: The new fab campus is expected to create 8,000 jobs and come online within three years.

business.title: Remote work settles at one-third of all professional hours
business.summary: New labor data suggests hybrid arrangements have stabilized after years of churn.

business.title: Renewables attract record quarterly investment inflows
business.summary: Storage and grid-modernization projects drew the largest share of new capital.

science.title: Astronomers confirm water vapor in nearby exoplanet atmosphere
science.summary: Spectra from the orbiting telescope show clear absorption bands on a temperate super-Earth.

science.title: Artemis crew completes final training for lunar south pole mission
science.summary: The four astronauts will attempt the first landing at the pole late next year.

science.title: Gene therapy trial restores partial vision in 12 of 14 patients
science.summary: The single-injection treatment targets a rare inherited retinal condition.

science.title: Deep-sea expedition catalogs 100 previously unknown species
science.summary: Highlights include a bioluminescent octopus and a coral that thrives near thermal vents.

science.title: New solar sail design passes key deployment test in orbit
science.summary: The 80-square-meter sail unfurled flawlessly and is now raising its orbit without propellant.

sports.title: Underdogs complete stunning comeback to reach the final
sports.summary: Trailing by two goals at the break, they scored three in eleven second-half minutes.

sports.title: Marathon world record falls by 41 seconds in Berlin
sports.summary: Perfect conditions and a fearless final 10K produced a landmark 2:00:12 finish.

sports.title: League announces expansion to two new cities next season
sports.summary: The franchise fees set a record, and both ownership groups plan new arenas.

sports.title: Injury update: star striker expected back for playoffs
sports.summary: Scans showed the hamstring strain is minor; a three-week recovery is projected.

sports.title: Grand slam qualifier produces the upset of the tournament
sports.summary: The world No. 214 defeated the third seed in straight sets on center court.

entertainment.title: Indie film sweeps festival awards ahead of wide release
entertainment.summary: The micro-budget drama took best picture, director, and screenplay honors.

entertainment.title: Beloved sci-fi series confirms final season premiere date
entertainment.summary: The showrunners promise a ten-episode arc that answers the show's oldest mysteries.

entertainment.title: Streaming numbers reveal a documentary renaissance
entertainment.summary: Nonfiction titles took five of the top ten slots for the first time ever.

entertainment.title: Reunion tour sells out 40 stadium dates in a single morning
entertainment.summary: Ticket platforms reported their highest single-day demand on record.

entertainment.title: Game adaptation earns rare praise from both critics and fans
entertainment.summary: The series holds a 94% critics score, with viewership doubling week over week.

gaming.title: Long-awaited RPG sequel finally gets a release date at showcase
gaming.summary: The studio confirmed a spring launch across PC and consoles after years of teasers.

gaming.summary: Built by a three-person team, the deckbuilder has sold over a million copies.

gaming.title: Major engine update promises big performance gains for open-world titles
gaming.summary: Developers say draw distances and load times improve sharply on mid-range hardware.

gaming.title: Competitive shooter unveils new season with reworked maps
gaming.summary: The overhaul rebalances several weapons and adds a ranked co-op mode.

gaming.title: Beloved handheld gets a surprise firmware update adding cloud saves
gaming.summary: The feature had been the community's most requested for over a year.

medicine.title: Updated STGs emphasise earlier ART initiation in TB co-infection
medicine.summary: New guidance shortens the window for starting antiretrovirals in co-infected patients.

medicine.title: Large trial shows benefit of community health-worker hypertension programs
medicine.summary: Task-shifting improved blood-pressure control in primary care settings.

medicine.title: WHO issues new guidance on antimicrobial stewardship
medicine.summary: The framework targets rising resistance in low- and middle-income countries.

medicine.title: Point-of-care ultrasound expands access in rural emergency care
medicine.summary: A pragmatic trial reports faster diagnosis with portable devices.
